---
title: "Pmdf3_regression"
format: html
---

```{r}
#load relevant libraries 
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)
install.packages("forestplot")
library(forestplot)

# STEP 1: Load PMDF3 cleaned risk data and add PCs

df_risk <- read.csv("PMDF3_risk_cleaned.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
cat("Rows in PMDF3 risk data:", nrow(df_risk), "\n")

pcs <- turkey_data %>%
  select(id_wgs_df2, PC1:PC20)

df_risk <- df_risk %>%
  left_join(pcs, by = c("IID" = "id_wgs_df2"))

cat("Rows after join:", nrow(df_risk), "\n")
cat("All 20 PCs present:", all(paste0("PC", 1:20) %in% names(df_risk)), "\n")
colnames(df_risk)
```


```{r}
# STEP 2: Prepare variables

df_risk <- df_risk %>%
  mutate(
    outcome      = ifelse(phenotype == "ALS", 1, 0),
    sex_at_birth = factor(sex_at_birth, levels = c("female", "male")),
    age_combined = ifelse(
      phenotype == "ALS",
      age_at_onset_years,
      age_at_survival_check_years
    )
  )

df_risk$Cyrius_phenotype <- factor(df_risk$Cyrius_phenotype,
                                    levels = c("NM", "IM", "PM", "UM"))

df_risk <- df_risk %>%
  mutate(
    metab_nonNM = factor(
      ifelse(Cyrius_phenotype != "NM", "nonNM", "NM"),
      levels = c("NM", "nonNM")
    ),
    metab_PMIM = factor(
      case_when(
        Cyrius_phenotype %in% c("PM", "IM") ~ "PM_IM",
        Cyrius_phenotype == "NM"            ~ "NM",
        TRUE                                ~ NA_character_
      ),
      levels = c("NM", "PM_IM")
    )
  )

cat("Metaboliser group sizes:\n")
print(table(df_risk$Cyrius_phenotype, df_risk$outcome))
```
```{r}
# STEP 3: Define covariates

pc_covariates <- paste0("PC", 1:5, collapse = " + ")
base_covars   <- "age_combined + sex_at_birth"
all_covars    <- paste(base_covars, pc_covariates, sep = " + ")
```

```{r}
# STEP 4: Run the 5 primary logistic regression models

m1 <- glm(
  as.formula(paste("outcome ~ metab_nonNM +", all_covars)),
  data   = df_risk %>% filter(!is.na(metab_nonNM)),
  family = binomial(link = "logit")
)

m2 <- glm(
  as.formula(paste("outcome ~ metab_PMIM +", all_covars)),
  data   = df_risk %>% filter(!is.na(metab_PMIM)),
  family = binomial(link = "logit")
)

m3 <- glm(
  as.formula(paste("outcome ~ Cyrius_phenotype +", all_covars)),
  data   = df_risk %>% filter(Cyrius_phenotype %in% c("NM", "IM")),
  family = binomial(link = "logit")
)

m4 <- glm(
  as.formula(paste("outcome ~ Cyrius_phenotype +", all_covars)),
  data   = df_risk %>% filter(Cyrius_phenotype %in% c("NM", "PM")),
  family = binomial(link = "logit")
)

m5 <- glm(
  as.formula(paste("outcome ~ Cyrius_phenotype +", all_covars)),
  data   = df_risk %>% filter(Cyrius_phenotype %in% c("NM", "UM")),
  family = binomial(link = "logit")
)

cat("M1 converged:", m1$converged, "\n")
cat("M2 converged:", m2$converged, "\n")
cat("M3 converged:", m3$converged, "\n")
cat("M4 converged:", m4$converged, "\n")
cat("M5 converged:", m5$converged, "\n")

```
```{r}
# STEP 5: Extract and display results

extract_or <- function(model, term, label) {
  coef_table <- summary(model)$coefficients
  if (!term %in% rownames(coef_table)) {
    return(data.frame(comparison = label, OR = NA, CI_low = NA,
                      CI_high = NA, p_value = NA))
  }
  est  <- coef_table[term, "Estimate"]
  se   <- coef_table[term, "Std. Error"]
  pval <- coef_table[term, "Pr(>|z|)"]
  data.frame(
    comparison = label,
    OR         = round(exp(est), 2),
    CI_low     = round(exp(est - 1.96 * se), 2),
    CI_high    = round(exp(est + 1.96 * se), 2),
    p_value    = round(pval, 4)
  )
}

results <- rbind(
  extract_or(m1, "metab_nonNMnonNM",   "Any non-NM vs NM"),
  extract_or(m2, "metab_PMIMPM_IM",    "PM + IM vs NM"),
  extract_or(m3, "Cyrius_phenotypeIM", "IM vs NM"),
  extract_or(m4, "Cyrius_phenotypePM", "PM vs NM"),
  extract_or(m5, "Cyrius_phenotypeUM", "UM vs NM")
)

results$FDR_adjusted_p <- round(p.adjust(results$p_value, method = "BH"), 4)
print(results)
```
```{r}

# =============================================================
# TURKEY DATA
# =============================================================
turkey_df <- data.frame(
  Comparison = factor(c("Any non-NM vs NM", "PM + IM vs NM",
                        "IM vs NM", "PM vs NM", "UM vs NM"),
                      levels = rev(c("Any non-NM vs NM", "PM + IM vs NM",
                                     "IM vs NM", "PM vs NM", "UM vs NM"))),
  OR       = c(1.05, 1.01, 0.98, 1.34, 1.48),
  LCI      = c(0.72, 0.68, 0.66, 0.43, 0.50),
  UCI      = c(1.53, 1.49, 1.47, 4.13, 4.43),
  OR_label = c("1.05 (0.72, 1.53)", "1.01 (0.68, 1.49)",
               "0.98 (0.66, 1.47)", "1.34 (0.43, 4.13)",
               "1.48 (0.50, 4.43)"),
  FDR      = c("0.96", "0.96", "0.96", "0.96", "0.96")
)

# =============================================================
# FRANCE DATA
# =============================================================
france_df <- data.frame(
  Comparison = factor(c("Any non-NM vs NM", "PM + IM vs NM",
                        "IM vs NM", "PM vs NM", "UM vs NM"),
                      levels = rev(c("Any non-NM vs NM", "PM + IM vs NM",
                                     "IM vs NM", "PM vs NM", "UM vs NM"))),
  OR       = c(1.80, 2.03, 2.20, 1.75, 0.56),
  LCI      = c(0.80, 0.87, 0.86, 0.31, 0.05),
  UCI      = c(4.05, 4.76, 5.58, 9.83, 6.09),
  OR_label = c("1.80 (0.80, 4.05)", "2.03 (0.87, 4.76)",
               "2.20 (0.86, 5.58)", "1.75 (0.31, 9.83)",
               "0.56 (0.05, 6.09)"),
  FDR      = c("0.42", "0.38", "0.38", "0.64", "0.71")
)

# =============================================================
# BUILD PLOTS — titles use *CYP2D6* for italic via markdown
# =============================================================
p_turkey <- make_forest_gg(
  turkey_df,
  title_text    = "*CYP2D6* metaboliser phenotype and ALS risk<br>Turkey cohort - multivariable logistic regression",
  xlim_low      = 0.25,
  xlim_high     = 6,
  or_label_pos  = 9,
  fdr_label_pos = 55,
  plot_xlim     = 130,
  xticks        = c(0.25, 0.5, 1, 2, 4, 6)
)

p_france <- make_forest_gg(
  france_df,
  title_text    = "*CYP2D6* metaboliser phenotype and ALS risk<br>France cohort - multivariable logistic regression",
  xlim_low      = 0.03,
  xlim_high     = 15,
  or_label_pos  = 22,
  fdr_label_pos = 350,
  plot_xlim     = 900,
  xticks        = c(0.05, 0.25, 0.5, 1, 2, 4, 8, 15)
)

# =============================================================
# COMBINE WITH PATCHWORK
# =============================================================
combined <- p_turkey + p_france +
  plot_annotation(
    tag_levels = "A",
    theme = theme(
      plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16, family = "serif")
    )
  )

pdf("forestplot_risk_Turkey_France_combined.pdf", width = 18, height = 7)
print(combined)
dev.off()
system("open forestplot_risk_Turkey_France_combined.pdf")
cat("Saved: forestplot_risk_Turkey_France_combined.pdf\n")

```

```{r}
# Print raw p-values clearly
cat("Raw p-values:\n")
cat("Any non-NM vs NM:", 0.8200, "\n")
cat("PM + IM vs NM:   ", 0.9792, "\n")
cat("IM vs NM:        ", 0.8667, "\n")
cat("PM vs NM:        ", 0.7577, "\n")
cat("UM vs NM:        ", 0.4714, "\n")

# Manually apply BH correction
raw_p <- c(0.8200, 0.9792, 0.8667, 0.7577, 0.4714)
adj_p <- p.adjust(raw_p, method = "BH")
cat("\nBH adjusted p-values:\n")
print(round(adj_p, 4))

# Also check directly from your models
cat("\nP-values directly from model summaries:\n")
cat("M1:", summary(m1)$coefficients["metab_nonNMnonNM", "Pr(>|z|)"], "\n")
cat("M2:", summary(m2)$coefficients["metab_PMIMPM_IM",  "Pr(>|z|)"], "\n")
cat("M3:", summary(m3)$coefficients["Cyrius_phenotypeIM", "Pr(>|z|)"], "\n")
cat("M4:", summary(m4)$coefficients["Cyrius_phenotypePM", "Pr(>|z|)"], "\n")
cat("M5:", summary(m5)$coefficients["Cyrius_phenotypeUM", "Pr(>|z|)"], "\n")
```

```{r}
cat("Risk analysis sample sizes:\n")
cat("Any non-NM vs NM:", nrow(df_risk %>% filter(!is.na(metab_nonNM))), "\n")
cat("PM + IM vs NM:   ", nrow(df_risk %>% filter(!is.na(metab_PMIM))), "\n")
cat("IM vs NM:        ", nrow(df_risk %>% filter(Cyrius_phenotype %in% c("NM", "IM"))), "\n")
cat("PM vs NM:        ", nrow(df_risk %>% filter(Cyrius_phenotype %in% c("NM", "PM"))), "\n")
cat("UM vs NM:        ", nrow(df_risk %>% filter(Cyrius_phenotype %in% c("NM", "UM"))), "\n")

```
